course_title: SURVEY OF MUSIC IN THE MIDDLE AGES
description: Major genres and composers of monophonic and polyphonic music, sacred and secular in Western Europe and England (ca. 7th-14th centuries).

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MUSIC 212or declared in Music, Music: Education, or Music: Performance graduate program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MUSIC 212or declared in Music, Music: Education, or Music: Performance graduate program
